name: super-browser
description: Universal browser and computer automation plugin for agents. Includes specialist skills, a routing CLI, and an MCP server for choosing the right browser, proxy, authenticated session, or desktop backend.

interface.shortDescription: Route agent browser and computer automation to the right tool.
interface.longDescription: Super Browser gives agents a documented plugin, CLI, and MCP interface for browser automation. It routes simple tasks to local Playwright, cloud browser work to Browserbase or Browser Use, logged-in sessions to Rtrvr, raw HTTP to Decodo, and full desktop work to Orgo, with specialist skills and approval policy for external writes.
